product.title: Akzidenz NG
product.body:
Akzidenz NG is Newglyph’s contemporary interpretation of the legendary Akzidenz Grotesk, designed by Ian Party to merge classic grotesk elegance with modern versatility. With 144 styles, it provides designers a comprehensive toolkit for editorial, branding, and digital work.
Organized into five bundles—Ultra Condensed, Extra Condensed, Normal, Expanded, and Ultra Expanded—each with 22 styles spanning Hairline to Extra Black, including italics, the family balances precision with expressive flexibility.
Akzidenz NG is also available in variable font format, enabling seamless transitions across weights and widths.
Available in OTF and Woff2 formats, Akzidenz NG blends tradition and contemporary design for professional-grade typography.
product.seo_title: Akzidenz NG – Modern Grotesk Font Family — Download Free Trials
product.seo_description: Akzidenz NG is a fresh reinterpretation of the classic. Designed as a large variable typeface family, Akzidenz NG is a versatile workhorse sans-serif intended for a wide range of uses from editorial and book design to branding, logotypes & websites.

brand.title: Newglyph
brand.body:
A Swiss type design studio in the heart of Lausanne, where we are pushing the boundaries of typography and variable font technology.
